name: omni-model
description: Self-hosted OpenAI-compatible AI proxy with environment-configured auth, rate limits and model routing.

OMNI_JWT_SECRET.description: Fallback JWT secret for clients that do not use App Check

OMNI_STORAGE_TYPE.description: Choose firestore (recommended) or memory for rate limits

OMNI_SECURITY_JWT_ENABLED.description: Enable the starter JWT authentication verifier

OMNI_SECURITY_FIREBASE_APPCHECK_ENABLED.description: Use Firebase App Check? Enter true or false (true is recommended)

OMNI_SECURITY_FIREBASE_APPCHECK_APP_ID.description: Optional Firebase App ID allowlist; leave blank for every app in this project

OMNI_PROVIDERS_DEFAULT_TYPE.description: Default upstream type; openai-compatible accepts any compatible endpoint

OMNI_PROVIDERS_DEFAULT_BASE_URL.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible endpoint URL; change it later in Cloud Run

OMNI_PROVIDERS_DEFAULT_API_KEY.description: Optional upstream API key; leave blank for an unauthenticated endpoint

OMNI_RATE_LIMITS_JSON.description: Request and token budget rules (JSON array)
